title: lactuca gorganica
intro: Lactuca gorganica is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family Asteraceae, native to Iran. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Lactuca gorganica has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and pain relief, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Lactuca gorganica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
